question.research_question: Which prior work most directly constrains claims and required baselines for comment-privileged supervision, public-induced affect distributions, retrieval-augmented emotion prediction, and reliable abstention under missing modalities?
question.scope_boundary: Methods and datasets directly relevant to T0 public-induced audience-affect distribution prediction; speaker-only emotion, visual crowd affect, future target-comment inputs, and propagation-only studies are excluded unless used as an explicit contrast.

include: Peer-reviewed or preprint work directly relevant to one of the four search lines
Dataset papers and official code repositories used to verify task, code, or license facts
exclude: Speaker-emotion-only or visual-crowd-affect-only work without an audience-response construct
Methods that require target-video future comments at T0 except as leakage or diagnostic contrasts
Propagation-only studies and unrelated CARM acronym uses outside the name audit
eligibility.date_range: inception through 2026-07-14, with frontier emphasis on 2023-2026

selection.research_question: Which prior work most directly constrains claims and required baselines for comment-privileged supervision, public-induced affect distributions, retrieval-augmented emotion prediction, and reliable abstention under missing modalities?

known_items.title: Privileged Knowledge Distillation for Dimensional Emotion Recognition in the Wild
known_items.expected_reason: Direct emotion-recognition use of training-only privileged modalities

known_items.title: MissModal: Increasing Robustness to Missing Modality in Multimodal Sentiment Analysis

coverage_audit.no_known_items_rationale: Not applicable; two in-scope known items were used for machine-recall checks, while other core anchors were verified by targeted primary-source checks documented in LITERATURE_SEARCH_REPORT.md.
coverage_audit.no_citation_chaining_rationale: This is a bounded scoping search, not a systematic review; targeted primary-source verification was used instead of formal citation chaining.

summary.source_coverage_basis: Four independent query lines each queried OpenAlex, Crossref, and DOAJ, followed by targeted primary-source verification.
summary.known_item_recall_basis: M2PKD and MissModal were recovered in their expected query lines.
summary.citation_yield_basis: No formal citation-chaining yield is claimed for this scoping search.
summary.unavailable_impact: Paid databases and restricted Chinese indexes were not searched; novelty and exhaustive-coverage claims are therefore forbidden.

accounting.dedup_method: Within-line DOI else normalized title/year; then cross-line DOI else normalized title/year. Screened means machine title/abstract candidate review; only two machine-recall known items are counted as included here. Manual primary-source anchors are reported separately.

stop_rule.rule: Stop after one three-layer multi-index recall round per line and one targeted primary-source verification round, because further broadening increased off-topic noise without changing the claim-boundary families.
stop_rule.observed_basis: All four lines produced a direct anchor and a required-comparison consequence; targeted verification added no new contribution family, while broad automatic rankings remained noisy.
